name: UFP INDUSTRIES INC
summary: UFP Industries, Inc. is a holding company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan, with subsidiaries in the U.S., Mexico, Canada, Spain, India, and Australia. It designs, manufactures, and supplies products made from wood, wood and non-wood composites, and other materials across three segments: Retail Solutions (pressure-treated lumber, composite decking, siding), Packaging (structural packaging, pallets, protective packaging), and Construction (factory-built housing, site-built, commercial, concrete forming).
